# Kreativ by 4Knotts

> Kreativ by 4Knotts is a full-stack tech + creative agency based in Delhi, India, offering brand strategy, content/story, design, and digital (web + social) services. The agency builds its own tools in-house rather than relying on off-the-shelf software.

Kreativ works across four pillars: **Strategy** (positioning, naming, brand architecture), **Story** (narrative, copywriting, content systems), **Design** (identity, typography, motion), and **Digital** (web development, social media, campaign launch). Kreativ also develops its own AI-powered tools in-house, including a full-stack platform (React/Vite frontend, Node/Express API) with OTP authentication, a dynamic pricing engine, a project-briefing wizard, and AI creative tooling built on the Claude API.

## Services
- Branding & Identity
- Website / Web App Development
- Social Media Marketing
- Video Production
- AI Solutions

## Location
Delhi, India. Available for remote and in-person projects.

## Contact
- Email: interact@kreativby4knotts.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kreativby4knotts
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kreativ-by-4knotts
